Anatta Nergui

← Collection

Hallucinating Factory

Another carrot
Dangles over there
Not here, not now but there —
In the empty space and time
Unseen —

Carrot dangles
And this donkey wonders
If it’s but
A hallucination

Even here and now
In this empty space and time
Without hallucinating
The day ahead —

Train to catch
Appointments to keep
Meetings to attend
Shopping trips and cooking

What could move
This donkey
If it didn’t see
What isn’t there

And if both
Donkey and the carrot
Are nowhere here
Nor there

Hallucinating factory
Must —
The none that’s left
Be

Atmosphere
wryvacant
Crux
fabrication
Words
91
Domain
desireillusion
Ground
existentialapophatic
